title: ELDOMA Black Baby Wrap Carrier - Lightweight, Breathable Baby Sling, Hands Free Baby Carrier Sling, Baby Carriers from Newborn to Toddler, (7-35 lbs / 3-15kg)
features: ELDOMA Baby Wrap Carrier – Soothe & Comfort Your Baby Naturally: Carry your little one close to your heartbeat in our ELDOMA baby wrap carrier. Made from a premium cotton polyester blend, this soft and stretchy baby wrap sling helps reduce crying and promotes restful sleep while keeping your baby secure, calm, and cozy.

For Newborns & Toddlers (7–35 lbs / 3–15 kg): Perfect from day one through early toddlerhood, this ELDOMA baby wrap carrier supports your baby’s growth and development every step of the way. Ideal for both moms and dads, it’s an excellent baby shower or registry gift for new parents looking for a comfortable and safe infant sling toddler carrier.

Soft, Stretchy & Breathable Comfort: Designed with a durable cotton and polyester blend, this soft baby wrap is gentle on your baby’s delicate skin and offers the right elasticity to mold perfectly to your body. Enjoy a secure hold without constant adjusting—ideal for long hours of babywearing and bonding with our baby carrier newborn.

Ergonomic Fit for Parent & Baby: Experience superior weight distribution and posture support with the ELDOMA hands-free baby carrier. Each time you tie this baby sling carrier, you create a custom, ergonomic fit that reduces back and shoulder strain while maintaining proper hip alignment for your baby’s healthy development.

Portable, Washable & Travel-Friendly: This lightweight newborn baby carrier easily folds into your diaper bag and leaves space for wipes, bottles, and essentials. The ELDOMA baby wrap carrier is machine-washable and dryer-safe, making it the perfect travel-friendly choice for active parents on the go.
